description: The purchase contract specifies that the seller will provide a one-year home warranty for the buyer. The TC must order it.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the home warranty details (provider, plan level) from the purchase agreement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the contract specifies the 'Gold Plan' from 'ABC Home Warranty'.

nodes.task_description: Place the order with the specified home warranty company.

expected_outcome.value: The order is successfully placed for the correct plan and property.

nodes.task_description: Send the invoice for the warranty to the title company to be paid from the seller's proceeds at closing.

expected_outcome.value: The invoice is forwarded to the escrow officer with payment instructions.
